purpose: Qualify two frozen, architecture-distinct MatPES-PBE-2025.2 teachers for later offline PES supervision; this protocol replaces only the failed M3GNet disagreement teacher from v1 and does not authorize H1 or online sampling guidance.

dataset.name: MatPES-PBE-2025.2
dataset.stress_source_unit: kbar Voigt [xx,yy,zz,yz,xz,xy] with DFT compressive-positive sign

selection.method: take the lexicographically smallest SHA256(selection_seed_string + ':' + matpes_id) values from the complete held-out test split
selection.lineage: Preserve the exact v1 512/32 held-out rows so replacing M3GNet by QET is the only scientific change.

independent_teacher_selection.rejection_reason: Its pinned model card declares MatPES-PBE-2024.11 rather than MatPES-PBE-2025.2, so it does not satisfy the matched-dataset teacher contract.
independent_teacher_selection.selection_reason: QET is architecture-distinct from TensorNet and explicitly declares training on the same MatPES-PBE-2025.2 dataset.

qualification_rules: both pinned checkpoint snapshots have complete file hashes and load without fallback
the two model classes and weight hashes are distinct
both checkpoints declare the MatPES-PBE-2025.2 energy reference, cutoff and periodic neighbor convention
the primary TensorNet exposes a named atom-feature layer suitable for frozen offline representation extraction
held-out energy, force and stress MAEs satisfy the unchanged v1 limits on the exact v1 sample
translation, proper-rotation, atom-permutation and unimodular-cell invariance/covariance satisfy the unchanged v1 FP32 limits
all predictions are finite and no selected structure fails
teacher disagreement is nonzero and is retained as an uncertainty field, not used as reverse-sampling guidance
advancement_rule: H0-C qualifies only if every rule passes. H0-D remains unauthorized until H0-C is committed and pushed; H1 remains unauthorized until H0-A through H0-E all qualify.
